report_text: Findings: Acute pulmonary emboli involving segmental and subsegmental branches of the right lower lobe pulmonary artery. No central PE. No imaging signs of right heart strain — RV/LV ratio within normal limits. No pleural effusion. Lung parenchyma is otherwise unremarkable. Impression: Acute subsegmental and segmental right lower lobe pulmonary embolism without right heart strain.
